title: Fernandezia cyrtophylla
taxonomy: Fernandezia cyrtophylla is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Orchidoideae and the tribe Vanillieae. Fernandezia cyrtophylla is further classified into the genus Fernandezia, which is a small group of orchids native to South America. The exact classification of this plant may vary depending on the source, but it is generally recognized as an orchid. The plant's classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Orchidaceae family.
